subcodes.first_line: O God! O Thou Who art the Opener of Doors, Who bewildereth hearts and minds, and Who prepareth the means for the success of Thy servants in the beginning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا فاتح الابواب و محیر القلوب و الالباب و مهیا الاسباب لنجاح عبادک فی المبدء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @service to others; to the Cause of God
